histoire.title: A Heritage
histoire.p1: At the heart of the agricultural lands of Chewigui-Tebourba in the governorate of Manouba, the Benayedos farm maintains a long-standing and respectful relationship with the land.
histoire.p2: Founded by Brahim Ben Ayed (1884 – 1935), the farm was later taken over by his eldest son Tahar Ben Ayed (1918 – 2010), who assumed responsibility at the age of 17. Since 2010, the farm has been managed by Hatem Ben Ayed, continuing an agricultural tradition passed down from generation to generation.
histoire.p3: Born from a simple conviction, Benayedos produces authentic agriculture, rooted in the rhythm of the seasons and in Tunisian agricultural know-how. Located in the heart of cereal plains, its lands benefit from a Mediterranean climate particularly favorable to the cultivation of cereals and legumes.
histoire.p4: Grown using methods that prioritize rain-fed farming and crop rotation, our productions preserve soil fertility and ensure sustainable agriculture, season after season.
histoire.quote: Benayedos is a land of work, patience, and transmission.

terre.title: An exceptional terroir
terre.subtitle: The Tebourba region benefits from an ideal Mediterranean microclimate, with rich soils that naturally nourish our crops.

productions.title: What the land
productions.subtitle: Crops embedded in a sustainable agricultural logic — crop rotation, respect for natural cycles and adaptation to the soil and climate characteristics of Tebourba.

olive_oil.name: Olive Oil
olive_oil.desc: Olive oil produced from traditional agricultural know-how. The olive harvest is carried out in order to preserve the quality of the fruit.

ble.name: Wheat
ble.desc: Wheat is one of the fundamental crops of the Benayedos farm. Adapted to the region's climatic conditions, it is cultivated using agricultural practices that promote grain quality and consistent yields.

feve.name: Broad Beans
feve.desc: Broad beans are part of the traditional crops of Mediterranean lands. They naturally enrich the soil with nitrogen and play an important role in crop rotation.

feverole.name: Faba Beans
feverole.desc: Faba beans are a legume particularly suited to sustainable agricultural systems. They improve soil fertility while producing a protein-rich seed.

pois_chiche.name: Chickpeas
pois_chiche.desc: An emblematic crop of Mediterranean agriculture, chickpeas occupy an important place in the farm's crop rotation system.

fenugrec.name: Fenugreek
fenugrec.desc: Fenugreek is a plant with numerous nutritional and medicinal properties. Its cultivation is rooted in local agricultural traditions.

vision.title: Our three pillars
vision.subtitle: The Benayedos farm is built on a vision of sustainable agriculture based on three essential principles:
vision.pillar1_desc: Preserving soil fertility and maintaining the natural balance of crops.
vision.pillar2_desc: Producing healthy crops adapted to the terroir and the seasons.
vision.pillar3_desc: Maintaining traditional agricultural practices while integrating modern techniques when necessary.
vision.quote: "To cultivate is to believe in tomorrow."

contact.title: Let's talk about your
contact.intro: Whether you are a food industry professional, a distributor, or simply passionate about authentic agriculture, we would be delighted to connect with you.

footer.description: A family farm in Tebourba, cultivating with respect and passion for generations.

whatsapp.message: Hello, I'm contacting you from the Benayedos website. I'd like to learn more about your productions.
